description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a combination of wood and metal construction. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of polished wood, giving it a traditional and robust appearance. The receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from dark, blued or parkerized steel, with the magazine being curved and detachable. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch. The muzzle end is fitted with a simple slant compensator or flash hider. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible wear and metallic texture, suggesting durability and frequent use.
description: A traditional AK-47 style rifle with wood furniture and a curved metal magazine, featuring iron sights and a metallic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow width, alignment of the iron sights, and the wooden upper handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and wooden components.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the rifle, showing the magazine curvature and the alignment of the wooden stock and handguard.
